head_sha: HEAD (docs+closure commit; this artifact commit is HEAD itself)
commits: HEAD (docs: ADR amendment + this closure artifact)
notes: PR-2 reframe: kept the 0.90 recall floor (unchanged at perf_gates.rs:159) and amended ADR-0.7.0-vector-binary-quant.md to cite the CORRECTED ANN/quantization-FIDELITY measurement (recall@10 = 0.937, CI 0.913-0.957, sigma 0.0116; bge-small candle, EU-7 N=7667, K=192, standard ANN method: exclude query-source before top-10 + dedup-by-id GT). Full CI clears 0.90; R-2sigma = 0.914 -> floor NOT raised (headroom for production variance + pending N=1M PR-3). The earlier 0.828 documented as a conservative-measurement artifact (+7.8pp), citing 0.7.2-PR-2c-recall-rootcause.md. ANN-vs-IR distinction kept sharp: the floor is fidelity (GT = exact f32 top-10 over same model), explicitly NOT IR-relevance. EU-8 IR ceiling recall@10 = 0.571 recorded as a separate embedder/task ceiling (NOT a gate), citing 0.7.2-EU-8-ir-recall-results.md; lever is a better embedder/graph, not K/ANN tuning. Added fast non-gated sentinel ac_013b_floor_matches_adr asserting the constant == 0.90 tied to ADR §2 point 4. cargo build --tests clean; sentinel passes. No IR gate introduced. No §6/§7 HITL gate conflicts with keeping 0.90.
